summary: Tested new AdvantEdge360 features: INR currency format, company detail page navigation, internal tasks, and assigned status. Fixed Client/Company model validation error where created_by/created_at were required but missing in seeded data.

fixed_during_testing.issue: 500 error due to Pydantic validation requiring created_by and created_at fields - some records in DB were missing these
fixed_during_testing.fix: Made created_by and created_at fields Optional in Company and Client models (server.py lines 1823-1824, 1853-1854)

seed_data_creation: Created test company and project for company overview endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Fixed model validation issue in Company and Client models. Backend tests verify: auth, company overview endpoint, internal task creation, and task status cycling including 'assigned' status.

currency_inr_format.notes: INR format verified on Finance page (Total Received, Pending Income, Labor Cost, Net Profit) and Company Detail page (Revenue card)

company_cards_navigation.notes: Company cards on ClientsPage are clickable and navigate to /companies/{companyId}

company_detail_page.notes: CompanyDetailPage loads with all 5 tabs. Backend /api/companies/{company_id}/overview returns correct structure with contacts, projects, proposals, tasks, finance data

internal_task_option.notes: Internal Task checkbox present in both TasksPage and Dashboard task creation dialogs. When checked, project selection is hidden. Backend accepts is_internal flag and optional project_id

assigned_status.notes: Assigned status appears in task status dropdown (TasksPage) and Team Tasks Overview section (Dashboard). Backend accepts 'assigned' as valid status value

mocked_api_notes: Gmail/Email notifications are in demo mode - stored in database but not actually sent
